ai_arena.label: AI MODELS. COMPETING.
ai_arena.title: ONE FIGHT. MULTIPLE MINDS.
ai_arena.subtitle: Every AI gets the same data. Each makes its own independent call. Track who is sharpest over time.

intro.label: What Is This?
intro.title: EVERY FIGHTER. FULLY DECODED.
intro.desc: — Complete fight history. Every bout. Every method. — Strike accuracy, grappling averages, finish rates. — AI scout brief generated per fighter. — Live intel — camp reports, weight cut flags, odds moves.

showcase_ai.label: Fight IQ Assistant
showcase_ai.title: Analyze with AI
showcase_ai.desc: Same data the AI models use. Ask anything about a fighter, a matchup, or a style clash. Get a data-backed answer, not a guess.
showcase_ai.feat1: Ask about any fighter or matchup
showcase_ai.feat2: Pulls from real stats and fight history
showcase_ai.feat3: Breaks down style clashes and tendencies
showcase_ai.feat4: Powered by the same intel as the AI prediction engine

showcase_fighters.label: Fighter Intelligence
showcase_fighters.title: EVERY FIGHTER. FULLY DECODED.
showcase_fighters.desc: Real data. Real history. Every fighter profiled with performance metrics, finish rates, style breakdowns, and live intelligence signals.

showcase_rankings.label: Rankings & Progression
showcase_rankings.title: THE SHARPEST MINDS RISE.
showcase_rankings.desc: Every pick affects your position. Consistency builds your legacy. Stars reward winners. Badges define who you are.
showcase_rankings.feat3: Net units ranking — no formulas, just results.

tier2.label: More Features
tier2.title: MORE FEATURES
tier2.picks_desc: Picks use real moneyline odds. Choose your winner, flag your confidence level, and track your net units. Compete with your fight IQ — not your wallet.
tier2.community_desc: Global and country chat rooms. Share picks, debate matchups, and compete against the sharpest minds in MMA.

how_it_works.label: How It Works
how_it_works.title: ANALYZE. COMPETE. DOMINATE.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Sign up, set your country, pick your display name. You are in.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Browse the fight card. Study the odds. Lock in your picks before the bell.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Watch results live. Your net units go up or down based on real odds math.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Your picks compound into a global score. Climb through divisions and earn your GRIT rank.

leaderboard.label: Competitive Edge
leaderboard.title: YOUR FIGHT IQ.
leaderboard.desc: Every pick counts. Every event shapes your ranking. The best analysts rise. Everyone else watches.
leaderboard.highlight1: Live global leaderboard with real-time scoring
leaderboard.highlight2: Monthly progression — earn stars & badge tiers
leaderboard.highlight3: Net units tracking mirrors real betting math
leaderboard.highlight4: Stars reward consistency — up to 5★ per month

pricing.label: Plans
pricing.title: ONE LEVEL UP.
pricing.free_desc: Get started with core features and community access.
pricing.plus_desc: Unlock the full community experience plus AI-powered analysis.
pricing.plus_feat3: Slip sharing — post your winning tickets
pricing.plus_feat4: Challenger badge next to your name in chat
pricing.pro_desc: Full power. AI chat, exclusive badges, and VIP perks.

core_features.label: PLATFORM FEATURES
core_features.title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED.
core_features.subtitle: One arena. Five weapons. Pick fights, track fighters, climb the leaderboard, and get AI-powered analysis — all in one place.
core_features.feat1_desc: Live event cards, active picks, and your personal performance stats at a glance.
core_features.feat2_desc: Pick the winner, method (KO / Sub / Decision), and round with confidence units.
core_features.feat3_desc: Full career stats, fight history, grappling/striking data, and AI scout briefs.
core_features.feat4_desc: Global and event-scoped rooms. Hundreds talking right now.
core_features.feat5_desc: Premium access to Grok, GPT-4o, and Claude for deep fight analysis.

ai_banner.label: AI ARENA
ai_banner.title: AI MODELS COMPETE ON THE SAME DATA.
ai_banner.desc: Track the sharpest insights over time. Every model builds its own accuracy record. The leaderboard does not lie.

community.label: COMMUNITY & CHAT
community.title: THE FIGHT TALK NEVER STOPS.
community.desc: Real fans. Real takes. Every event has its own live room — or go global. Premium members get slip uploads, badge visibility, and token AI chat access.
community.feat1_desc: Chat with MMA fans worldwide or filter to your country.
community.feat2_desc: Post your winning tickets as shareable fight slips.
community.feat3_desc: Your Ninja → GOAT badge appears next to every message.
community.feat4_desc: Challenger tier unlocks the full fighter emoji set.
community.feat5_desc: Premium access to Grok, GPT-4o, and Claude fight analysts.

event_picks.label: EVENT PICKS
event_picks.title: THREE LAYERS. ONE LOCK.
event_picks.desc: Pick the winner, then go deeper. Choose the method — KO/TKO, Submission, or Decision. Then set your confidence from 1 to 5 units. Your full card locks when the fight opens.
event_picks.feat4: Multi-layer lock — time, event status, and manual flags

intel_section.title: LIVE INTEL FEED
intel_section.sub: Real-time signals — training camps, odds movement, injury updates
